CustomField.description: This is used internally to create URs in bulk.Please don't add in UR layout. The bulk utilizations will be created via assumed utilization or the staging, the assembly utilization creation has been handled, in the reconciliation studio and the staging itself, hence from UR trigger handler the creation is stopped. And the creation of invoice also stopped in the UR trigger handler if the record created through the bulk entry.
CustomField.label: _Bulk Entry
